case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC VS. ALEJANDRO RAMON MIRANDA AMADOR

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-05-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAR-18-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DID NOT STIP TO THE PRO TEM JUDGE.
